name: IPR-2A "Forge"
description: The Forge upgrades the industrial printing pipeline to wire-arc directed energy deposition. A plasma torch and wire-feed system lay down structural steel and aluminum alloy at high deposition rates, building up part geometry layer by layer in a shielded atmosphere tent. Post-deposition CNC milling arms finish critical tolerances. Effective on excavator frames, refinery pressure vessels, and large mining chassis. Substantially faster than the Mold for medium-density structures.
